'''''Voyages SF'' 7''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[1989]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including two adventures for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The articles were called "[[The Anatra Dora|The ''Anatra Dora'']]" and "[[Carrier Assignment]]" and were written by [[James B. King]].
